metadata.description: A collection of AI plugins for various tasks.

plugins.name: architecture-skills
plugins.description: Architecture and design workflow skills for recording decisions, comparing tradeoffs, designing interface contracts, reviewing dependency choices, designing failure behavior, building type-safe designs, and planning safe data migrations.

plugins.name: code-explorer
plugins.description: Deep codebase exploration agent and phase skills for building evidence-based maps of unfamiliar repositories.

plugins.name: code-smith
plugins.description: Implementation-phase agent for turning approved Planning Forge handoffs into focused, self-verified code changes.

plugins.name: planning-forge
plugins.description: Planning workflow agents for turning rough tasks into implementation-ready specifications, architecture designs, test plans, prototype findings, and saved planning documents.

plugins.name: review-skills
plugins.description: Review workflow skills for scoping pull requests, improving review findings, planning fixes, and gatekeeping merge readiness.

plugins.name: shell-safety
plugins.description: Catalog of dangerous shell command patterns and safe rewrites for AI agents.

plugins.name: specification-skills
plugins.description: Requirements and specification workflow skills for auditing acceptance criteria, finding requirement ambiguity, defining scope boundaries, surfacing assumptions, enumerating edge cases, handling mid-build spec deviations, and decomposing specs into implementation tasks.
